evals.prompt: Write a weekly stakeholder update for the 'Mobile App Redesign' project. We finished the login screens. We are currently working on the home feed. The design team hasn't delivered the profile screen assets yet, which might delay us next week. We are currently 'On Track'.
expectations: Lists 'Finished login screens' under Key Achievements
Lists 'Working on home feed' under Current Focus
Highlights the missing design assets as a Risk/Blocker
